settings.title: Made to last
settings.text: Tarnish-free, waterproof, hypoallergenic finishes — wear every piece every day, no babying required.

settings.title: Priced honestly
settings.text: No mined stones, no markup games — just the look you want at roughly 70% off the real thing.

settings.title: Designed in-house
settings.text: Every collection is sketched, sampled and finished by our own small design team, drop by drop.

settings.title: Gift-ready always
settings.text: Every order ships in a ribboned pouch — free gift wrap and a handwritten note whenever you want one.

settings.name: Mia R.
settings.text: Genuinely cannot believe these are under $30. The pearl drops look like the designer pair I saved for and never bought.

settings.name: Sofía L.
settings.text: Wore the charm bracelet every single day for two months — showered, swam, the whole thing. Still sparkling. Obsessed.

settings.name: Hana K.
settings.text: Bought a stack for my little sister's birthday and now we're both hooked. Packaging is so cute it's gift-ready.
